zh.Beira Litoral, Portugal: 葡萄牙貝拉 利托拉爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal於1154年11月11日出生在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉時，他的父親Afonso Henriquez I45歲，母親Matilda De Savoie40歲。他和Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort至少有6個兒子和7個女兒。他於1170年登記服兵役。他去世於1212年3月26日在他的家鄉享年57歲，埋葬在葡萄牙可布拉。

zh-hans.Beira Litoral, Portugal: 葡萄牙貝拉 利托拉爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal于1154年11月11日出生在葡萄牙可布拉可布拉时，他的父亲Afonso Henriquez I45岁，母亲Matilda De Savoie40岁。他和Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort至少有6个儿子和7个女儿。他于1170年登记服兵役。他去世于1212年3月26日在他的家乡享年57岁，埋葬在葡萄牙可布拉。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Portugal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Salvador, Alberto, Alejandra, Alejandro, Cesar, Fernando, Jesus, Luis, Manuel.  Portuguese Aderito.

Spanish, Portuguese, Catalan, French, English (Lincolnshire), and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): ethnic name or habitational name for someone from Portugal or who had connections with Portugal. The name of the country derives from Late Latin Portucale, originally denoting the district around Oporto (Portus Cales, named with Latin portus ‘port, harbor’ + Cales, the ancient name of the city). In some cases the surname may be simply a nickname for someone who had business connections with Portugal. The English surname is a rare variant of Pettengill .

variants.name: Pettengill
meanings: English: medieval English name for someone from Portugal (see Portugal ), from Middle English Portingal(e) ‘Portugal’ (Old French Portugalois), later also meaning ‘Portuguese’.

variants.name: Portal
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Pedro, Carlos, Juan, Luis, Amado, Arnoldo, Caridad, Jose, Norberto, Ricardo, Rosa Elena, Tomas.  Portuguese Amadeu.  Jewish Arie, Ber, Shlomo, Yael, Ziva.  French Marcelle, Andre, Jean Luc.

Spanish, Catalan, Galician, Portuguese, southern French, and Jewish (Sephardic): topographic name for someone who lived near the gates of a fortified town, typically the gatekeeper (from a word, Spanish portal, southern French porta(i)l, meaning ‘gate’); or a habitational name from any of the places in Portugal, Galicia, and France named Portal or, in France, Le Portal.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): possibly a shortened form of   Portugal  .

nameMeanings.name: Sancho
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin, perhaps from Latin sanctus ‘holy’. It will always be associated with Sancho Panza , Don Quixote's companion.

en.lifeSummary: When Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal was born on 11 November 1154, in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, his father, Afonso Henriquez I, was 45 and his mother, Matilda De Savoie, was 40. He had at least 6 sons and 7 daughters with Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort. He registered for military service in 1170. He died on 26 March 1212, in his hometown, at the age of 57, and was buried in Coimbra, Portugal.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal est né le 11 novembre 1154, à Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, son père, Afonso Henriquez I, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Matilda De Savoie, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles avec Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1170. Il est décédé le 26 mars 1212, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Coimbra, Portugal.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal am 11. November 1154 in Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal geboren wurde, war sein Vater Afonso Henriquez I 45 und seine Mutter Matilda De Savoie 40. Er hatte mit Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er hat sich 1170 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 26. März 1212 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Coimbra, Portugal begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal è nato il il 11 novembre 1154 nel Coimbra, Coimbra, Portogallo, il suo padre, Afonso Henriquez I, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Matilda De Savoie, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie con Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1170. Morì il 26 marzo 1212, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Coimbra, Portogallo.

ja.lifeSummary: Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugalが1154年11月11日にポルトガルコインブラコインブラで生まれた時，父Afonso Henriquez Iは45歳，母Matilda De Savoieは40歳であった。彼はDulce Aldonza de Aragão Consortとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼は1170年に兵役登録をした。彼は1212年3月26日に故郷で57歳で死去し，ポルトガルコインブラにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal(이)가 1154년 11월 11일 포르투갈 코임브라 코임브라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Afonso Henriquez I(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda De Savoie(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1170년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1212년 3월 26일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 포르투갈 코임브라에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal nasceu em 11 de novembro de 1154, em Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, seu pai, Afonso Henriquez I, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Matilda De Savoie, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas com Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1170. Ele faleceu em 26 de março de 1212, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Coimbra, Portugal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal родился 11 ноября 1154 г. в местности коимбра, коимбра, Португалия, его отцу по имени Afonso Henriquez I было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda De Savoie, 40. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей от Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort. В 1170 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 26 марта 1212 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности коимбра, Португалия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sancho I de Portugal 2nd Rei de Portugal nació el 11 de noviembre de 1154, en Coimbra, Coimbra, Portugal, su papá, Afonso Henriquez I, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Matilda De Savoie, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas con Dulce Aldonza de Aragão Consort. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1170. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1212, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Coimbra, Portugal.
